queries.query: SELECT * FROM HS_BILL_PRODUCTS WHERE IS_ACTIVE = 1 ORDER BY PRODUCT_NAME
INSERT INTO HS_BILL_PRODUCTS (PRODUCT_NAME, DESCRIPTION, UNIT_PRICE) VALUES (@ProductName, @Description, @UnitPrice)
UPDATE HS_BILL_PRODUCTS SET PRODUCT_NAME = @ProductName, DESCRIPTION = @Description, UNIT_PRICE = @UnitPrice WHERE PRODUCT_ID = @ProductId
UPDATE HS_BILL_PRODUCTS SET IS_ACTIVE = 0 WHERE PRODUCT_ID = @ProductId
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM HS_BILL_INVOICE_ITEMS WHERE PRODUCT_ID = @ProductId
